title: Spicy Fluffy Caramel Boil-Sugar
description: This dish is a show-off Australian creation that's crispy on the outside and fluffy inside, perfect for keto-friendly snacks or desserts.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together the coconut sugar, spicy brown sugar, and pepper flakes.
Dip slices of avocado in the mixture until evenly coated. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 6-7 minutes or until crispy.
Serve immediately to enjoy the show-off dessert.
Note: Adjust spice level as desired.
